sqlMap.select: select vcf.id as "flowId", vci.serialNum as "serialNum" from vm_cap3ReceiveCorrespond_Info vci left join vm_cap3ReceiveCorrespond_flow vcf on vcf.serialNum = vci.serialNum where vci.flowUrl is null
select vcf.id as "flowId", vci.serialNum as "serialNum" from vm_cap3ReceiveCorrespond_Info vci left join vm_cap4ReceiveCorrespond_flow vcf on vcf.serialNum = vci.serialNum where vci.flowUrl is null
sqlMap.update: update vm_cap3ReceiveCorrespond_Info set flowUrl=#flowUrl# where serialNum=#serialNum#
update vm_cap4ReceiveCorrespond_Info set flowUrl=#flowUrl# where serialNum=#serialNum#
sqlMap.select: select vcf.id as "flowId", vci.serialNum as "serialNum" from vm_cap3SendCorrespond_Info vci left join vm_cap3SendCorrespond_flow vcf on vcf.serialNum = vci.serialNum where vci.flowUrl is null
select vcf.id as "flowId", vci.serialNum as "serialNum" from vm_cap3SendCorrespond_Info vci left join $vmName$ vcf on vcf.serialNum = vci.serialNum where vci.flowUrl is null
sqlMap.update: update vm_cap3SendCorrespond_Info set flowUrl=#flowUrl# where serialNum=#serialNum#
update vm_cap4SendCorrespond_Info set flowUrl=#flowUrl# where serialNum=#serialNum#
